headline: OpenAI Removes Legacy Deep Research Mode from ChatGPT
raw_snippet: OpenAI deprecated the legacy deep research mode, the original o3-based version launched in February 2025 that could browse the web for 5-30 minutes and scan hundreds of sources. The current deep research experience running on GPT-5.2, upgraded in February 2026, remains unchanged. Historical conversations and results stay accessible.
verification_notes: URL returned 403 — likely bot protection, manual verification recommended
